name: Labellerr
description: Data labeling and annotation platform with auto-labeling for images, video, text and LLM/RLHF training data.

seo.title: Labellerr — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Labellerr: Data labeling and annotation platform with auto-labeling for images, video, text and LLM/RLHF training data.

when_to_use: Managing end-to-end data labeling workflows for ML teams
Running AI-assisted annotation to reduce manual labeling effort
Tracking annotator quality and dataset consistency over time
Building active learning pipelines to prioritize impactful labels

pros: Covers image, video, text and RLHF in one tool
cons: UI and reliability not quite Scale/Labelbox polish
Smaller ops team for massive projects
review.verdict: Pragmatic labeling choice if price matters and your datasets aren't at hyperscale.
review.best_for: Mid-size ML teams labeling multi-modal data on a budget
review.not_for: Foundation labs with billion-example RLHF operations

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
